/CAL:BENCH WARRANT-RET 10-20-21 FTA PHC;SAW PENDING/INTC/BWDNC/SAWD/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE ANDIS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/WS/X:ATTEND COUNSELING & GROUPS AS DIRECTED: LATINO GROUPS/X:STAY OUT OF AREA BOUNDED BY POLK, GEARY, POWELL, 5TH,HOWARD & 10TH ST, SF EXCEPT FOR COURT/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:PHC/DOP/
